variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list misses the clearest SG&A component rows. Selected exact A-column labels 'Sales expenses' and 'Administration expenses' from the statement because they are the best recurring overhead components and are preferable to 'Other Operating Expenses'. Excluded amortization-related and non-recurring restructuring rows per instructions. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales expenses, [Income Statement] Administration expenses

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; usable only if no more specific interest line is available.

candidates.why: Specific interest expense line and strong match for XINT.

Most direct interest expense label for non-lease debt; best first-priority choice.

candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest, lower priority than primary statement line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortized cost

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of the most appropriate reported interest-expense labels, preferring specific interest expense over broader financial expenses. Excluded lease-only supplemental/duplicate rows from final choice.

candidates.why: Usable only if no parent/owner equity line exists; includes non-controlling interests here.
Balancing row, not appropriate.
Not equity; total balance sheet.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the preferred owner-only equity line. Selected 'Equity attributable to parent company shareholders' to avoid double counting with MIB, since 'Total equity' includes non-controlling interests. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to parent company shareholders
